mapper.select:
SELECT o.order_id, o.member_idx, o.order_date, o.total_price, o.status,
b.book_title, b.cover_image AS book_cover, COUNT(*) AS book_count,
p.pay_method AS payment_method, p.used_points AS used_point, CEIL(o.total_price * 0.1) AS earned_point,
d.receiver_name, d.receiver_phone, d.zipcode, d.delivery_address, d.address_detail, d.memo, d.status_code FROM orders o JOIN orderitem oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN book b ON oi.book_id = b.book_id JOIN payment p ON o.order_id = p.order_id JOIN delivery d ON o.order_id = d.order_id WHERE o.order_id = #{order_id} AND o.member_idx = #{member_idx} GROUP BY o.order_id

SELECT o.order_id, o.member_idx, o.order_date, o.total_price, o.status,
-- 대표 책 1권 (MIN 사용 또는 LIMIT 1 써도 됨) MIN(b.book_title) AS book_title, MIN(b.cover_image) AS book_cover,
COUNT(oi.book_id) AS book_count
FROM orders o JOIN orderitem oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN book b ON oi.book_id = b.book_id WHERE o.member_idx = #{member_idx} GROUP BY o.order_id ORDER BY o.order_id DESC

SELECT o.order_id, o.member_idx, o.order_date, o.total_price, o.status,
b.book_title, b.cover_image AS book_cover, COUNT(*) AS book_count,
p.pay_method AS payment_method, p.used_points AS used_point, CEIL(o.total_price * 0.1) AS earned_point,
d.receiver_name, d.receiver_phone, d.zipcode, d.delivery_address, d.address_detail, d.memo, d.status_code FROM orders o JOIN orderitem oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN book b ON oi.book_id = b.book_id JOIN payment p ON o.order_id = p.order_id JOIN delivery d ON o.order_id = d.order_id WHERE o.order_id = #{order_id} GROUP BY o.order_id
SELECT o.order_id, o.member_idx, o.order_date, o.total_price, o.status, b.book_title, b.cover_image AS book_cover FROM orders o JOIN book b ON o.book_id = b.book_id ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
